title: The Last time update is posted in the updates section
excerpt: can i get a log that tells my when an update was last created or replied at an item or sub item

posts.author: Ori_Eitan (ori eitan)
posts.cookedHtml: can i get a log that tells my when an update was last created or replied at an item or sub item

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ori,

We have this automation recipe which you might find useful:

Screen Shot 2023-11-27 at 1.44.37 pm736×496 16.4 KB

That said, I am afraid at this stage, we don’t have an activity log specific to the updates section. This is a great suggestion which I’ll take with our team. I can also convert this into a feature request so our community to upvote the feature

posts.author: Ori_Eitan (ori eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you
I created the following automation that gives me a partial answer

This provides an answer for creating an update and only in ITEM, not in SUBITEM

Is there a possibility for such automation for SUBITEM?

MONDAY758×399 12.3 KB

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Ori_Eitan !

I checked and it seems this custom automation does not support subitems yet.

So currently, you would need to use something like Make.com to have the update in a subitem act as the trigger for another action.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
